### Highlights | 更新内容

- 新增主机重命名功能，并持久化保存自定义主机名称。
  Added host renaming with persisted custom host display names.
- 主机卡片、搜索结果、配对提示和离线提示现在统一显示自定义主机名，界面一致性更好。
  Host cards, search results, pairing prompts, and offline alerts now consistently use custom display names.
- 修复重命名弹窗在中文环境下的布局问题，避免说明文字与输入框重叠。
  Fixed the rename dialog layout in Chinese so the description and input field no longer overlap.
- 补全菜单栏、工具栏、关于页与设置界面的中英文本地化，整体品牌与文案更加统一。
  Expanded bilingual localization across the menu bar, toolbar, About panel, and settings UI for more consistent branding.
- 新增应用外观选项，支持跟随系统、浅色和深色模式。
  Added an appearance preference with System, Light, and Dark modes.
- 修复语言切换初始化时的递归通知问题，提升启动稳定性。
  Fixed recursive language-change notifications during initialization to improve startup stability.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- 更新 README、README.en 与 ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS，整理项目说明、上游来源和致谢信息。
  Updated the README, README.en, and ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS with clearer project guidance, upstream lineage, and credits.
- 发布流程现在要求为每个版本提供单独的中英文对照 release notes，避免自动回退到 commit 标题摘要。
  The release workflow now requires a dedicated paired bilingual notes file for each version instead of falling back to commit-subject summaries.
